mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM simulation_config
( config_key ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR check_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tech_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR match_keywords ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_config ( config_key, tech_code, check_name, match_keywords, enabled, simulation_mode, version, prompt_sections, disease_mappings, output_schema, defaults ) VALUES ( #{configKey}, #{techCode}, #{checkName}, #{matchKeywords}, #{enabled}, #{simulationMode}, #{version}, #{promptSections}::jsonb, #{diseaseMappings}::jsonb, #{outputSchema}::jsonb, #{defaults}::jsonb )
mapper.update: UPDATE simulation_config SET config_key = #{configKey}, tech_code = #{techCode}, check_name = #{checkName}, match_keywords = #{matchKeywords}, enabled = #{enabled}, simulation_mode = #{simulationMode}, version = #{version}, prompt_sections = #{promptSections}::jsonb, disease_mappings = #{diseaseMappings}::jsonb, output_schema = #{outputSchema}::jsonb, defaults = #{defaults}::jsonb, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
